title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at GAP India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at GAP India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
GAP India Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Amritsar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About GAP India Asia Pacific Associates:
GAP India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAP India Asia Pacific Associates!
